name: 4-Tier Shoe Rack with Basket - Brightroom™
description:
This 4-Tier Shoe Rack with Basket from Brightroom™ is perfectly sized to hold 12 pairs of shoes and accessories neatly and within reach. Made from steel, this rack features one top basket shelf, two small shelves, and one larger bottom shelf for boots or taller items. Once assembled, place it freestanding in a closet or near an entryway for quick access to your favorite footwear as you head out the door.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
